message:
fix(brenner-loop): fix bugs found during code review

session-context.tsx:
- Fix unused variable warning (removed → _removed)

hypothesis-lifecycle.ts:
- LOCK_PREDICTION event now requires predictionIndex parameter
- Fix hasUnlockedPredictions guard to validate specific prediction index
- Fix LOCK_PREDICTION action to append to lockedPredictions instead of replacing
- Add canTransitionWithEvent() for full event validation with parameters
- Simplify canTransition() to only check state validity (no guard execution)
- Add defensive checks for negative duration in calculateLifecycleStats()
- Add documentation clarifying avgDaysInDraft approximation

index.ts:
- Export new canTransitionWithEvent function

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
